brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 4 with correct identification of N3 as the failing condition; only performs surface-level threshold comparison with no second-order analysis (e.g., how close N3 is to recovery, implications for PMF); no reflection on reasoning method or potential misreads of the problem; implicitly verifies by listing all five conditions but does not cross-check or sanity-check from another angle; correctly flags the investor's error and notes the 0.2x gap but offers no confidence framing or uncertainty; the OR condition in N4 (k>0.5 OR CAC<$50) was not considered as a potential ambiguity or alternative read; every condition maps explicitly to a threshold value, fully reproducible by a third party
